---
title: "Travels in Tartary, Thibet and China, during the years 1844, 5, 6, Tr. William Hazlitt"
---

## Travels in Tartary, Thibet and China, during the years 1844, 5, 6, Tr. William Hazlitt

**Author:** Évariste Régis Huc
**Date:** 1852
**Imprint:** London: National Illustrated

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
